title: Pillagers
description: Allows you to get villager loot by killing them.
body:
Pillagers

Allows you to get villager loot by killing them!

When this mod is installed villagers will have a chance to drop their trade items when killed. By default players have a 5% chance to drop 1-3 trade items. The chance of this happening goes up by 1.5% for each level of looting used. There is an additional 15% chance if they are killed during a raid. Normally these items will only drop if the villager is killed directly by a player.

This mod is extremely configurable. The following values can be changed.

  • base-chance - The chance of villagers dropping loot.
  • looting-chance - The amount to increase the chance for each level of looting.
  • raid-chance - the amount to increase the chance by when a raid is active.
  • player-required - Does the villager need to be killed by a player.
  • exclude-fake-players - Can fake players like auto-killers / grinders get the drops?
  • require-profession - Can villagers drop items if they don't have a profession?
  • only-in-villages - Does the villager need to be in a village to drop loot?
  • only-in-raids - Does the villager need to be in a raid to drop loot?
  • loot-children - Can child villagers drop loot?
  • bad-omen-chance - The chance that pillaging a villager will give you the bad omen effect.
  • loot-amount - The min/max number of items to drop when a villager is pillaged.
